samples.xml_description: Implement a 64-bit ripple carry adder with internal pipeline registers. Clock input. Active low reset signal. Enable signal for addition operation. 64-bit input operand A. 64-bit input operand B. 65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb. Output enable signal. Number of pipeline stages. Behavioral description of a ripple carry adder with internal pipeline registers. wire [63:0] sum_stage_0 = adda ^ addb; // XOR operation for the sum at pipeline stage 0. wire [64:0] carry_stage_0 = {1'b0, (adda & addb)}; // AND operation for the carry at pipeline stage 0. wire [63:0] sum_stage_1 = sum_stage_0 ^ carry_stage_0[63:0]; // XOR operation for the sum at pipeline stage 1. wire [64:0] carry_stage_1 = {1'b0, (sum_stage_0 & carry_stage_0[63:0])} + carry_stage_0; // AND and addition operation for the carry at pipeline stage 1. wire [63:0] sum_stage_2 = sum_stage_1 ^ carry_stage_1[63:0]; // XOR operation for the sum at pipeline stage 2. wire [64:0] carry_stage_2 = {1'b0, (sum_stage_1 & carry_stage_1[63:0])} + carry_stage_1; // AND and addition operation for the carry at pipeline stage 2. result = carry_stage_2[63:0]; // Assigning the final sum to the output result. o_en = carry_stage_2[64]; // Assigning the output enable signal.
